method: linear interpolation of USGS IV observations to exact UTC 15-minute anchors across gaps up to 12 hours; longer outages remain unavailable

encoding.u: UTC epoch second of first quarter-hour anchor
encoding.v: NAVD88 feet multiplied by 100; null means unavailable; subsequent entries are 900 seconds apart
encoding.p: daily maximum NAVD88 feet multiplied by 100

jonasCalibration.method: preserve the Stone Harbor gauge tide shape and scale its excursion about the day's low water

days.j: North Wildwood Winter Storm Jonas calibration to 9.44 ft MLLW / 6.69 ft NAVD88
